About Summit Garage Door

12+ years serving Las Vegas and surrounding areas

Since 2012, Summit Garage Door has been serving Southern Nevada with honest, dependable garage door services. Founded by a Las Vegas native, we understand how the desert climate affects your garage door system.

We believe in upfront pricing, clear communication, and lasting solutions—not quick fixes. Our team trains monthly on the latest technologies to serve you better.

As active members of the Las Vegas community, we sponsor little league teams and donate services to local veterans. Your trust means everything to us.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Summit Garage Door

Trusted garage door professionals serving Las Vegas, NV and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
